blockers.description: xcodebuild CLI can't find simulator destination (SDK 26.4 vs runtime 26.2 mismatch)
blockers.workaround: Use Xcode app directly — open ZenSocial.xcodeproj, press ⌘R to build and run on iPhone 17 simulator

human_actions_pending.action: Build and run in Xcode (⌘R), then test 4 UAT items in 03-HUMAN-UAT.md
human_actions_pending.context: Verifier confirmed all 5 must-haves are code-complete. Only runtime behavior needs human confirmation.

human_actions_pending.action: Reply 'approved' in new session after tests pass, or describe failures for gap closure
human_actions_pending.context: Triggers phase completion: ROADMAP/STATE update, next phase routing

decisions.decision: On-device only scope (no backend APNs relay)
decisions.rationale: Avoids server infrastructure; foreground + BGAppRefreshTask covers the stated use case
Consistent with app's Observation framework pattern; accessible from any Swift file

decisions.decision: Pre-prompt as ViewModifier (.alert) not a sheet
decisions.rationale: Lightweight, non-intrusive; fits ZenSocial's calm design ethos

decisions.decision: Login detection via URL transition away from /accounts/login
decisions.rationale: Most reliable signal without JS injection; fires in didFinish navigation delegate

next_action: In new session: run /gsd:resume-work, then tell user to open Xcode and run the 4 UAT tests in 03-HUMAN-UAT.md. After user replies 'approved', call `node gsd-tools.cjs phase complete 03` and run update_roadmap step.
context_notes: Phase 3 is fully code-complete. All 3 execution plans ran (03-00, 03-01, 03-02). Verifier gave human_needed status — 5/5 must-haves verified at code level, 4 items need device/simulator testing. The project.pbxproj had merge conflict markers that were cleaned up and committed. VERSION tracking got confused during merge (chore commits show [build 1],[build 2] etc. instead of incrementing from 32 — this is a cosmetic issue with the commit hook, not a real problem). Xcode is open and ready to build.
